$comment: Project-specific Bash redirects consumed by the global hook at ~/.claude/hooks/redirect-bash-commands.py. Each entry tests every `commands` pattern (`Bash(...)`-style glob, mirrors permissions.deny syntax) against the proposed Bash command; the first match denies the tool call and surfaces `reason` back to the agent. See AGENTS.md §3 for why these scripts exist.

redirects.reason: Use bun lint, bun typecheck, or bun format instead of invoking tools directly.
Use the GitHub API via Fetch() instead of invoking gh directly
Use the Read(), Write(), Edit() and Find() tools instead of invoking sed, grep, find, rg or awk directly
Do not start the dev server as the user probably has their own dev server running, and it will fail to bind to the same port.
Use bun instead of node, npm, npx
